items.name: Kkot Galbisal
items.description: Premium boneless short rib, prized for its fine marbling and naturally rich flavor. Grilled quickly over high heat, the meat stays tender and juicy, releasing a deep beef aroma with every bite. A true favorite for those who appreciate the pure taste of top-quality beef. Best enjoyed with a simple pinch of salt. Perfect for sharing or savoring all to yourself.
items.simplified_description: High-quality boneless short rib, grilled to perfection, tender and juicy.

items.name: Kkot Deungsim
items.description: Prime ribeye cap, renowned for its exceptional marbling and tenderness, hand-cut to showcase its natural beauty. Grilled over an open flame, the delicate layers of fat melt into the meat, creating a buttery texture and deep, beef-forward flavor. This signature cut offers a luxurious Korean barbecue experience rich, juicy, and unforgettable, perfect for savoring each bite in its purest form.
items.simplified_description: Prime ribeye cap, grilled to enhance its rich flavor and tenderness.

items.name: Oli Jumulleog
items.description: Tender duck slices marinated in a bold blend of Korean spices, garlic, and gochugaru for a deep, smoky heat. Stir-fried to lock in juiciness, each bite delivers a perfect harmony of savory, spicy, and slightly sweet flavors that linger on the palate. A vibrant choice for those who crave a bit of fire with every bite. Pairs perfectly with an ice-cold beer.
items.simplified_description: Marinated duck stir-fried with spicy Korean flavors.
